rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Unexpected Internal Process Name (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Unexpected Internal Process Name (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: e930ba8f-388a-4436-8326-4ffb1c52b111
status: experimental
description: "Detects powershell processes renamed to notepad.exe. This is a narrow\
  \ example for \ndemonstration purposes only. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection\
  \ Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rename-system-utilities/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1036.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \notepad.exe
    OriginalFileName: PowerShell.EXE
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
